'''thobangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yttric|yttric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yttric|yttric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thobangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobangithi|thobangithi]] || [[word:thobangiji|thobangiji]] || [[word:thobangishi|thobangishi]] || [[word:thobangiki|thobangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobanguthuthu|thobanguthuthu]] || [[word:thobangujuju|thobangujuju]] || [[word:thobangushushu|thobangushushu]] || [[word:thobangukuku|thobangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobanguthu|thobanguthu]] || [[word:thobanguju|thobanguju]] || [[word:thobangushu|thobangushu]] || [[word:thobanguku|thobanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangufthuf|thobangufthuf]] || [[word:thobangufjuf|thobangufjuf]] || [[word:thobangufshuf|thobangufshuf]] || [[word:thobangufkuf|thobangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobangethe|thobangethe]] || [[word:thobangeje|thobangeje]] || [[word:thobangeshe|thobangeshe]] || [[word:thobangeke|thobangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobangothotho|thobangothotho]] || [[word:thobangojojo|thobangojojo]] || [[word:thobangoshosho|thobangoshosho]] || [[word:thobangokoko|thobangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobangotho|thobangotho]] || [[word:thobangojo|thobangojo]] || [[word:thobangosho|thobangosho]] || [[word:thobangoko|thobangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangofthof|thobangofthof]] || [[word:thobangofjof|thobangofjof]] || [[word:thobangofshof|thobangofshof]] || [[word:thobangofkof|thobangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfthĂŻf|thobangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfjĂŻf|thobangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfshĂŻf|thobangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfkĂŻf|thobangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thobangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thobangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thobangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thobangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfthĂŻf|thobangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfjĂŻf|thobangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfshĂŻf|thobangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfkĂŻf|thobangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfthĂŻf|thobangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfjĂŻf|thobangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfshĂŻf|thobangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobangĂŻfkĂŻf|thobangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobangĂŠthĂŠ|thobangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thobangĂŠjĂŠ|thobangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thobangĂŠshĂŠ|thobangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thobangĂŠkĂŠ|thobangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobangathatha|thobangathatha]] || [[word:thobangajaja|thobangajaja]] || [[word:thobangashasha|thobangashasha]] || [[word:thobangakaka|thobangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobangatha|thobangatha]] || [[word:thobangaja|thobangaja]] || [[word:thobangasha|thobangasha]] || [[word:thobangaka|thobangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangafthaf|thobangafthaf]] || [[word:thobangafjaf|thobangafjaf]] || [[word:thobangafshaf|thobangafshaf]] || [[word:thobangafkaf|thobangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thobangasha|thobangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobangshĂ«sha|thobangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobangrosha|thobangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobangmusha|thobangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobangyasha|thobangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobangnkshĂ«sha|gothobangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobangnkrosha|gothobangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobangnkmusha|gothobangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobangnkyasha|gothobangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thobabangasha|thobabangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobabangshĂ«sha|thobabangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobabangrosha|thobabangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobabangmusha|thobabangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobabangyasha|thobabangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobabangnkshĂ«sha|gothobabangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobabangnkrosha|gothobabangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobabangnkmusha|gothobabangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobabangnkyasha|gothobabangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thebĂŠngasha|thebĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thebĂŠngshĂ«sha|thebĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thebĂŠngrosha|thebĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thebĂŠngmusha|thebĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thebĂŠngyasha|thebĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothebĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gothebĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothebĂŠngnkrosha|gothebĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothebĂŠngnkmusha|gothebĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothebĂŠngnkyasha|gothebĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thobfangasha|thobfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobfangshĂ«sha|thobfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobfangrosha|thobfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobfangmusha|thobfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobfangyasha|thobfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobfangnkshĂ«sha|gothobfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobfangnkrosha|gothobfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobfangnkmusha|gothobfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobfangnkyasha|gothobfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
